title: Islamic Nasheeds Audio
subtitle: A 717-file audio collection presented in one episode.
description: Seven hundred seventeen audio nasheed files, including 715 MP3 files and 2 M4A files, collected into a single Legacy Music episode from the Archive.org item islamic-nasheeds.
description_html: Seven hundred seventeen audio nasheed files, including 715 MP3 files and 2 M4A files, collected into a single Legacy Music episode from the Archive.org item islamic-nasheeds.
summary: A single Legacy Music episode containing all 717 audio files from the Archive.org item islamic-nasheeds.

show_notes_markdown:
## Source
- [Archive.org item](https://archive.org/details/islamic-nasheeds)

## Collection
- 717 audio files
- 715 MP3 files
- 2 M4A files
- All audio files are loaded into this single episode
